title: Azure Paxels
description: Created becasue Fabric 1.19.4 has no good paxel mods updated.
body:
This is for Fabric only and requires Fabric API.



This mod adds six new types of Paxels, specifically designed for Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite tiers. A paxel is a multi-functional tool that can serve as a shovel, axe, and pickaxe all in one item. Compared to the conventional tools, these paxels offer significantly faster mining and harvesting speeds, making resource gathering more efficient and streamlined. Moreover, these paxels can perform additional functions such as stripping wood and creating dirt paths, similar to the functionality of an axe or a shovel.

The recipe is 2 sticks (1x bottom middle, 1x middle), Same Tier Pickaxe(top left), Same Tier Shovel (top middle), and Same Tier Axe (top right)
